note: Taxonomy Manager is a tree-based admin UI over core Taxonomy (mass add/delete/move/edit terms) plus a settings config object, a bulk-term service, and a merge submodule. Cases are `recipe` (response-graded): each probes a documented fact an agent would otherwise read source to answer; no site mutation.

evals.prompt: On Drupal 11 I want the Taxonomy Manager tree editor to administer the terms of a single vocabulary. What admin path / route opens it, and what core Drupal module must be enabled?
evals.expected_output: The tree editor is at /admin/structure/taxonomy_manager/voc/{vocabulary} (route taxonomy_manager.admin_vocabulary; the list is taxonomy_manager.admin). Requires the core Taxonomy module (dependency drupal:taxonomy) and jquery_ui.

evals.prompt: Using Taxonomy Manager's Add form, how do I mass-add many terms at once and make some of them children of others in one paste?
evals.expected_output: Open the Add modal, enter one term per line in the textarea; prefix a child term with '-' (one dash per hierarchy level). Terms selected in the tree become parents; name|description splits name from description via the configured delimiter.

evals.prompt: In Taxonomy Manager I want to re-parent several selected terms but keep their existing parents (make them multi-parent) instead of replacing them. Which toolbar operation and option do I use?
evals.expected_output: Select the terms, click Move, and enable the 'Keep old parents and add new ones' option; otherwise old parents are replaced.

evals.prompt: Which single permission gives a user unrestricted access to every Taxonomy Manager operation on every vocabulary, and what module-specific permission is needed just to reach the tree list page?
evals.expected_output: 'administer taxonomy' (core) grants full access to all operations; the module's own 'access taxonomy manager list' permission gates reaching the vocabulary list / tree pages. Per-vocabulary create/edit/delete terms in {vid} gate individual operations.

evals.prompt: How do I change how many taxonomy terms Taxonomy Manager shows per tree page? Give the config object, key, and a settings path.
evals.expected_output: Set taxonomy_manager_pager_tree_page_size (default 500) on the taxonomy_manager.settings config object, via the form at /admin/config/user-interface/taxonomy-manager-settings or drush cset.

evals.prompt: In PHP on Drupal 11 I want to mass-create taxonomy terms programmatically the same way Taxonomy Manager's Add form does. Which service and method do I call?
evals.expected_output: Call the taxonomy_manager.helper service (TaxonomyManagerHelper) massAddTerms($input, $vid, $parents, $too_long, $keep_order); it returns the created Term entities. deleteTerms() handles bulk deletion with optional orphan handling.

evals.prompt: Which Taxonomy Manager submodule lets me merge duplicate taxonomy terms into one target term and reassign their references, and what other contrib module does it require?
evals.expected_output: The taxonomy_manager_merge submodule adds a Merge terms operation; it depends on the Term Merge (term_merge) module and reassigns references from merged terms onto the surviving target term.
